# Paradise Vacation Suites

> An exclusive collection of designer-appointed apartment suites in the Island City of Wilton Manors, Fort Lauderdale. Tropical heated pool, walking distance to Wilton Drive, 18 minutes to Fort Lauderdale Beach. From $99/night.

Paradise Vacation Suites is a boutique boutique vacation rental property at 2120 NE 26th Street in Wilton Manors, Florida — South Florida's celebrated Island City. The property is operated by hospitality veterans with two decades of experience running boutique properties in Provincetown (Crowne Pointe, Brass Key).

The suites are individually-numbered:
- Apartments 01 through 06: one-bedroom suites, ~800 sq ft, sleep 2, from $99/night
- Suites 2112, 2120, 2124: two-bedroom villas, 1,150 sq ft, sleep 4-6, from $170/night

Every suite is a fully equipped apartment with full kitchen, premium linens, dedicated workspace, and pool access. The property features a heated outdoor pool (84°F year-round), lush tropical gardens with pergolas with pergolas, free private on-site parking, and business-class fiber wifi.

Located 0.5 miles from the heart of Wilton Drive (10-minute flat walk), 4.2 miles from Fort Lauderdale Beach (18-minute drive via Sunrise Boulevard), and 4 miles from Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport (FLL, 10-minute drive). Wilton Manors has the second-highest concentration of same-sex households of any city in the United States according to the 2020 US Census.

Reservations are booked direct, or through Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com, and TripAdvisor. The property has a 4.9/5 average rating across 200+ verified reviews. Direct bookings through paradisevacationsuites.com receive the best rate and most flexible cancellation policy.

Phone: 954-868-5671 (answered seven days a week, 9 AM – 9 PM ET)
Email: welcome@paradisevacationsuites.com
Address: 2120 NE 26th Street, Wilton Manors, FL 33305

## Core pages

- [Home](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/): Property introduction, every suite at a glance, amenities, neighborhood teaser, guest reviews
- [The Suites](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/suites/): Detailed information about each individual suite — character, layout, pricing, photos, side-by-side comparison table
- [Property Overview](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/overview/): What makes the property distinctive — three reasons guests return (privacy of an apartment, service of a resort, walk to the Drive)
- [Why Paradise](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/why-paradise/): Direct comparison of Paradise vs. Fort Lauderdale beach hotels vs. Wilton Manors Airbnbs
- [The Area & Wilton Drive](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/area/): Comprehensive guide to Wilton Drive — restaurants, bars, shops, walking times
- [Wilton Manors Guide](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/wilton-manors-guide/): The complete Wilton Manors guide — geography, history, where to eat, drink, shop, dance
- [LGBTQ+ Fort Lauderdale](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/lgbtq-fort-lauderdale/): LGBTQ travel guide to Greater Fort Lauderdale and Wilton Manors — events, neighborhoods, history
- [Long-Term Stays](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/long-term-stays/): Information for guests staying a week, a month, or a season — snowbirds, remote workers, family visits
- [Reviews](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/reviews/): Verified guest reviews from Airbnb, TripAdvisor, Booking.com, and VRBO
- [FAQ](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/faq/): 22 frequently asked questions covering booking, check-in, suites, property, neighborhood, and special stays
- [Contact](https://paradisevacationsuites.com/contact/): Phone, email, address, directions from FLL airport, parking, hours

## Booking

- [Book Direct](https://paradisevacationsuites.lodgify.com/en/all-properties): Direct booking portal — best rate, most flexible cancellation
